annotation_target.structure: Later section sixth consequent — tonic resolution through ornaments
teaching_goals: the ornamental resolution should feel like a sigh, not an exercise
let the final tonic ring quietly
style_tips: the arrival is warm and inevitable

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 69–72 of Nocturne in Eb Major, Op. 9 No. 2 (continuation of mm. 65–68), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 69–72 and describe the completion.
